hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *src/*.ts|*src/*.tsx) npm run typecheck;; *) exit 0;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *src/lib/*|*src/data/*|*src/actions/*|*tests/*) npx vitest related "$f" --run 2>&1;; *) exit 0;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *src/components/ui/*) exit 0;; *src/components/*|*src/app/*) :;; *) exit 0;; esac; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; total=$(grep -cE '>[A-Za-z][^<]{2,}<' "$f" 2>/dev/null); deva=$(perl -CSD -ne 'print if /[\x{0900}-\x{097F}]/' "$f" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "${total:-0}" -gt 0 ] && [ "${deva:-0}" -eq 0 ]; then jq -n --arg f "$f" '{systemMessage: ("Bilingual check: " + $f + " has user-facing text but no Marathi (मराठी) detected — CLAUDE.md requires every label/error as English / Marathi.")}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; base="$(basename "$f")"; case "$base" in .env.example) exit 0;; .env|.env.*) jq -n --arg b "$base" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:($b+" holds secrets (Supabase/AWS/R2/Gemini) — edit it manually outside Claude Code, not via Edit/Write.")}}';; *) exit 0;; esac; }
